evals.prompt: Migrate this MatrixScan code from BarcodeBatch to BarcodeAr. The visual feedback should be frame highlights on each tracked barcode (matching the existing Frame overlay style). File: MigrationSimpleSample.js
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, replaces all BarcodeBatch* symbols with BarcodeAr equivalents, replaces DataCaptureView.forContext with new BarcodeArView({...}), wires a highlightProvider returning BarcodeArRectangleHighlight, switches context.setMode to context.addMode, preserves the results map and camera lifecycle, replaces barcodeBatch.isEnabled with barcodeArView.start()/stop(), and calls connectToElement on the view.

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlayStyle is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeAr is present in the output file
BarcodeArView is present in the output file
BarcodeArSettings is present in the output file
BarcodeArRectangleHighlight is present in the output file
context.addMode( is present in the output file
context.setMode( is NOT present in the output file
DataCaptureView is NOT present in the output file
view.addOverlay( is NOT present in the output file
connectToElement( is called on the BarcodeArView instance
barcodeArView.highlightProvider is assigned an object with highlightForBarcode
The results map and its population from the session are preserved (semantic)
camera.switchToDesiredState( is preserved in the output (camera lifecycle unchanged) (semantic)
barcodeBatch.isEnabled is NOT present in the output file
barcodeArView.start() or barcodeArView.stop() is used to replace barcodeBatch.isEnabled toggling (semantic)
session.addedTrackedBarcodes is used instead of Object.values(session.trackedBarcodes) in the listener (semantic)
Import from 'scandit-capacitor-datacapture-barcode' does not include any BarcodeBatch symbols (semantic)

evals.prompt: Migrate this MatrixScan code from BarcodeBatch to BarcodeAr. The bubbles above each barcode should become BarcodeAr annotations. File: MigrationBubblesSample.js
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, replaces all BarcodeBatch* symbols with BarcodeAr equivalents, replaces DataCaptureView.forContext with new BarcodeArView({...}), wires an annotationProvider using BarcodeArInfoAnnotation or BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation (since BarcodeArCustomAnnotation is unavailable on Capacitor), removes the manual Quadrilateral width heuristic and viewQuadrilateralForFrameQuadrilateral calls, removes TrackedBarcodeView and createBubbleWithContent, migrates freeze/unfreeze to barcodeArView.stop()/start(), and replaces setViewForTrackedBarcode with the annotation provider pattern.

assertions.text: BarcodeBatch is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeBatchSettings is NOT present in the output file
TrackedBarcodeView is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeArCustomAnnotation is NOT present in the output file
BarcodeAr is present in the output file
BarcodeArView is present in the output file
barcodeArView.annotationProvider is assigned an object with annotationForBarcode
BarcodeArInfoAnnotation or BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation is used inside annotationForBarcode (semantic)
The agent chose BarcodeArInfoAnnotation or BarcodeArResponsiveAnnotation as the annotation type because BarcodeArCustomAnnotation is not available on Capacitor (semantic)
DataCaptureView is NOT present in the output file
view.addOverlay( is NOT present in the output file
context.setMode( is NOT present in the output file
context.addMode( is present in the output file
Quadrilateral is NOT present in the output file
viewQuadrilateralForFrameQuadrilateral is NOT present in the output file
createBubbleWithContent is NOT present in the output file
setViewForTrackedBarcode is NOT present in the output file
barcodeBatch.isEnabled is NOT present in the output file
The freeze/unfreeze toggle is migrated to use barcodeArView.stop() and barcodeArView.start() (semantic)
session.removedTrackedBarcodes is still handled to clean up state (semantic)
connectToElement( is called and awaited on the BarcodeArView instance
Import from 'scandit-capacitor-datacapture-barcode' does not include BarcodeBatch, BarcodeBatchAdvancedOverlay, TrackedBarcodeView, or BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay (semantic)
